antiZionistNotes: No ARPC pastors found in Knox Seminary Open Letter signatory lists. No ARPC pastors found with public anti-Zionist statements. No ARPC-specific anti-Zionist activity found in web searches. The ARP denomination has no public position on Zionism/Israel.
lgbtqStatus: The ARP condemns same-sex sexual behavior as incompatible with Biblical morality. No LGBTQ-affirming churches found.

womenLeadership.pastorsAndElders: The ARP does NOT ordain women as pastors or elders.
womenLeadership.deacons: IMPORTANT: The ARP allows individual congregations to ordain women deacons since 1971 Form of Government revision. The vote barely passed (154-73, 5 votes above 2/3 threshold). The session of each congregation determines whether women can serve as deacons. A 2023 Special Committee recommended maintaining this status quo. Not all ARP churches have women deacons, but the denomination permits it at the congregational level.
womenLeadership.implication: Some ARP churches have ordained female deacons. This is a denomination-wide allowance, not deviation.
